content: Il problema è che non abbiamo abbastanza soldi.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:The problem is in that we don't have enough money
eng:The problem is that we don't have enough money
eng:The problem is we don't have enough money
eng:The trouble is that we do not have enough money
